architecture.name: LandMap
architecture.stack: Next.js App Router + Prisma + PostgreSQL + NextAuth

item.role: Main client shell, view routing, map/list/detail orchestration
Leaflet-based map rendering, boundary and partition drawing
Core entities: User, Property, Bid, Document, PropertyView
NextAuth credentials auth and JWT/session shaping
PostgreSQL connection template for local environments

flow.name: Browse properties
flow.step: User interacts with map/search in src/app/page.tsx.
API route queries Prisma models and returns normalized JSON.
UI updates markers/cards/details and optional premium overlays.

flow.name: Authentication
flow.step: User submits credentials via auth modal.
NextAuth credentials provider validates password hash with bcrypt.
JWT and session callbacks enrich token with id/email/role.
Role-based views (admin/vendor/premium) unlock in client shell.

flow.name: Bidding
flow.step: User places bid from property details.
/api/bids validates property status and partition constraints.
Bid record is persisted and property status may transition to BIDDING.

crossCuttingConcerns.concern: Local UI state in page shell + hooks; auth state through SessionProvider.
Basic request checks in API routes, Prisma constraints in schema.
Tailwind v4 tokens and theme vars defined in globals.css.
